ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (e.g., Birmingham, AL) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the team (e.g., 12U) */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the team plays (e.g., Baseball, Soccer) */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach associated with the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the record belongs to */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the record is recorded */,
  "record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the team (e.g., 33-14-1) */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  "events_played" INTEGER /* Total number of events played by the team */,
  "events_won" INTEGER /* Number of events won by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between goals for and goals against */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the league for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Tournament, Regular Season) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the event is for (e.g., Baseball, Soccer) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the event's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_event_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team participating in the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the team's participation (e.g., Won, Lost, Tied) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the team in the event */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the team in the event */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Goals conceded by the team in the event */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_event_participation_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_event_participation_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Coach, Admin, Parent) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
